issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Trace a RAG pipeline as nested spans with cost tracking
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used generic print/logging without Langfuse-specific tracing primitives; treatment used @observe and @observe(as_type="generation") with langfuse_context.update_current_trace for nested spans and metadata.

scenarios.name: Fetch a versioned prompt and score the resulting trace
scenarios.rationale: Baseline managed prompts in files with custom logging; treatment used langfuse.get_prompt(name, version=N) with prompt.compile and langfuse.score(trace_id, name, value, data_type) per the SKILL.md.
